name: project-laser-game
description: Easter egg from Supercell's Brawl Stars working in desktop browser with arrow key and space bar controls:   https://andrei-paraschiv.github.io/project-laser-game/

scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:windows: npm run build && npx electron-packager . "Project Laser" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist_electron --overwrite --ignore="\\.vs|android|dist_electron|node_modules"
